Package org.eventb.core.pog.state

Interface IPOGStateRepository

All Superinterfaces:
IStateRepository<IPOGState>
All Known Implementing Classes:
POGStateRepository
public interface IPOGStateRepository extends IStateRepository<IPOGState>
This class provides access to the proof obligation generator state repository.
Since:
1.0

    Modifier and Type

    Description
    IPORoot
    getTarget()
    Returns a handle to the PO file to be generated.

    Methods inherited from interface org.eventb.core.tool.IStateRepository

  • Method Details

    • getTarget

      IPORoot getTarget()
      Returns a handle to the PO file to be generated. This returned PO file is guaranteed to exist.
      Returns:
      a handle to the PO file to be generated
